occupation.evidence: Customer: Main job kar raha hoon.

income_band_inr.evidence: Agent: Okay chaliye koi issue nahi hai minimum main 5 lakh ke around aapko brief karke chalti hoon okay. Customer: Hmm.

temperature.evidence: Customer: Are paise bachenge tab toh paise abhi bach hi nahi rahe hain.

objections.quote: Madam jo yeh plan aap bata rahi ho main already State Bank mein le rakha hoon.
Are paise bachenge tab toh paise abhi bach hi nahi rahe hain.

monthly_savings_capacity_inr.evidence: Customer: Are paise bachenge tab toh paise abhi bach hi nahi rahe hain.

investment_sophistication.evidence: Customer: Haan aur meri wahan premium ja raha hai ek ja raha hai 1.5 lakh ka ja raha hai aur doosra bhi same hi hai.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: Ghar walon ne mana kiya kisi se nahi batana hai apni income income nahi batate apni.

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer has no surplus funds and already holds multiple insurance policies.

approachability.reasoning: Customer explicitly stated they have no surplus funds and already hold multiple insurance products.

call_narrative.opening_hook: Agent introduced a Tata AIA plan combining term and mutual fund benefits, to which the customer responded with a neutral 'Batao'.
call_narrative.customer_response: Customer was polite but firm in declining to disclose income and eventually revealed they have no spare budget.
call_narrative.key_event: Customer revealed they already hold two insurance policies with high premiums and have no current savings capacity.
call_narrative.ending: Agent accepted the customer's refusal and ended the call politely.

key_quotes: Are paise bachenge tab toh paise abhi bach hi nahi rahe hain.
Madam jo yeh plan aap bata rahi ho main already State Bank mein le rakha hoon.
